outputs.rework_notes: Cannot proceed. The advisory 'MCU Factory Verification Review Advisory' must be registered in the advisory system before the verification review workflow can complete. Once registered, re-trigger the MCU Factory Verification Reviewer with the same inputs.
outputs.next_steps: 1. REGISTER the advisory named exactly 'MCU Factory Verification Review Advisory' in the advisory registry. The name must match character-for-character (case, spacing, punctuation). 2. Once registered, re-invoke the MCU Factory Verification Reviewer agent with the same inputs (project_root, design_root, design name: mspm33c321a_derivative). 3. Do NOT substitute 'Signoff Advisory' or 'Spec Advisory' — the workflow requires the exact advisory by name and will reject substitutes.
